scripts.clean: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); for (const path of ['packages/nexus-bvh/dist','packages/nexus-converter/dist','packages/nexus-core/dist','packages/nexus-fbx/dist','packages/nexus-mmd/dist','packages/nexus-obj/dist','apps/playground/dist']) rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true });"
